query: SELECT status, COUNT(*) as cnt, SUM(CASE WHEN totalAssets = 0 OR totalAssets IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as empty_assets, SUM(CASE WHEN overallRiskScore IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as null_risk FROM domain_intel_scans GROUP BY status ORDER BY cnt DESC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2k2SuDvpDb6F44q.5f28f8362a85 --database VmWWcXQYZJYuALRdNNvsC2 --execute SELECT status, COUNT(*) as cnt, SUM(CASE WHEN totalAssets = 0 OR totalAssets IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as empty_assets, SUM(CASE WHEN overallRiskScore IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as null_risk FROM domain_intel_scans GROUP BY status ORDER BY cnt DESC;
